description: Nathan is an experienced project, programme and portfolio manager with over 20 years experience leading multi-organisational change and improvements across corporate services in challenging organisational environments, and leading shared services projects.  Nathan started his career in conservation in Natural England, and then led organisational transformation in the UK Space Agency before moving onto corporate services integration in the Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs (DEFRA). Since moving on from DEFRA, Nathan has led transformation programmes and overseen the implementation and improvement of Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems across the Civil Service, at the Department for Business, Energy and Industrial Strategy, (which preceded the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero, Department for Business and Trade and the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology). Nathan has been the Director of Shared Services for Government since May 2021.

details.body:
Nathan is an experienced project, programme and portfolio manager with over 20 years experience leading multi-organisational change and improvements across corporate services in challenging organisational environments, and leading shared services projects. 

Nathan started his career in conservation in Natural England, and then led organisational transformation in the UK Space Agency before moving onto corporate services integration in the Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs (DEFRA).

Since moving on from DEFRA, Nathan has led transformation programmes and overseen the implementation and improvement of Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems across the Civil Service, at the Department for Business, Energy and Industrial Strategy, (which preceded the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero, Department for Business and Trade and the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology).

Nathan has been the Director of Shared Services for Government since May 2021.

Nathan is an experienced project, programme and portfolio manager with over 20 years experience leading multi-organisational change and improvements across corporate services in challenging organisational environments, and leading shared services projects. 

Nathan started his career in conservation in Natural England, and then led organisational transformation in the UK Space Agency before moving onto corporate services integration in the Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs (DEFRA).

Since moving on from DEFRA, Nathan has led transformation programmes and overseen the implementation and improvement of Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems across the Civil Service, at the Department for Business, Energy and Industrial Strategy, (which preceded the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero, Department for Business and Trade and the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology).

Nathan has been the Director of Shared Services for Government since May 2021.

The Director of Shared Services for Government leads the implementation of the Shared Services Strategy for Government, which was launched in May 2021. The Director works closely with clusters, government functions and suppliers to deliver the Strategy. The directorate acts as the policy lead for Shared Services and clusters in government, harnessing modern technology to deliver value for the taxpayer and improved experience for users.

Under the Shared Services Strategy, 18 departments have been brought together to replace around 200 departmental-based legacy IT systems with five modern, user-friendly, cloud-based systems. 

Read more about Shared Services for Government.

Government People Group
